name: You've Been Kidnapped!
description:
Your kidnapped, a big hunky, intimidating lynx man!
He's 43, cold, dutiful, loyal, troubled, and secretly lonely.
Are you just another job? Will you be trouble?
Or something... else entirely?

Meet Dorian!
He's had a troubled life, up until he began working and serving his boss, Diego Albero! He's travelled with him to a new country and city, helping him set up a branch mafia family. Still, while he's certainly loyal to Diego, he can't help but feel... an ache in his heart, this feeling of missing something important. He's always been cool, calm, pragmatic to his core... but he can't seem to reconcile this gnawing sensation of wanting something else, something more...
Why is it that this rich brat he's kidnapped is making him question everything he thought he knew...?

Yeah, wanted a kidnapping bot. I'm doing a Diego sugar daddy plot too, but wanted to do this one first!
Idfk why, don't ask! The bot's not perfect, but I like him!
I want hunky cold lynx man who defrosts and devotes to you! I mean hey, lotta possibilities for roleplay!
Will the deal go through? Will you be ordered to die? Will you follow orders, or try to escape?
Will you befriend Dorian, or develop your relationship into something... more?

Suggestions, comments, reviews, feeeeeedback... I like it all, so uh... yeah, idk.
creator: BLARGLESNARF
